title: Void king dimension
description: Adds an epic boss fight with the Void King and his minions, spreading corruption, and powerful weapons.
body:
👑 Void King Dimension – Enter the Shadows

Dive into a mysterious dimension ruled by darkness.
This plugin adds a full boss experience featuring the Void King, powerful enemies, and legendary rewards.

🗿 Key Features:
Void Knight Statues: Scattered across the world. Break one to summon a Void Knight!
Void Shards: Collect 5 from defeated knights to craft the King Summoner.

Void King Boss:
Summoned using the King Summoner item.

Unique fight phases:
75% HP: Teleports players into the Shadow Realm (only bows deal damage).

50% HP: Creates illusions.

35% HP: Summons Shadow Wither Skeletons.

15% HP: Doubles in size, strikes lightning every minute.

⚔️ Loot:
Upon defeat, the Void King drops the powerful Void Scythe.
Throwable weapon (like a trident or bow).
Inflicts Wither effect, knockback, and high damage.
100% drop chance.

Prepare wisely... only the strongest will survive the Void.
